title: tephrosia flexuosa
intro: Tephrosia flexuosa, also known as the Horsefly Tree or Wild Bean, is a small, thorny shrub native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia flexuosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia flexuosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used to make traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments.
